socialCreditsDescription: Social Credit is a way for Solar Network to evaluate users. It is calculated based on their behavior and interactions. With a base score of 100, higher scores indicate a user's credibility within the community. Scores change over time to reflect a user's recent behavior. Users with higher credit ratings enjoy more benefits, while users with lower credit ratings may have some functionality restricted.

publisherQuotaInfoHint: Publisher slots are used when you create a publisher. If you have no available slots, you won't be able to create new publishers until. It does not limit the number of publishers you can collaberate with others.
realmQuotaInfoHint: Realm slots are used when you create a realm. If you have no available slots, you won't be able to create new realms until. It does not limit the number of realms you can collaborate with others.
onboardingWelcomeDesc: A peaceful space to express yourself freely and connect with others. Join a vibrant community built on respect and creativity.
onboardingExpressDesc: Share your thoughts with Posts, write long-form Articles, or capture moments with Moments — choose the format that fits your story.
onboardingRealmsDesc: Discover communities organized by shared interests. From hobby groups to creative collectives, find your people.
onboardingChatDesc: Connect through real-time messaging with friends and group chats. Stay in touch across all your devices.
onboardingStellarDesc: Unlock exclusive benefits with our membership program. Earn rewards, access premium features, and support the community.
onboardingWhatsNewDesc: Check out the latest features and improvements:
onboardingRealmBoostsDesc: Supercharge your realm with boosts! Level up to unlock custom labels, extra quota, boosted visibility, and max quota for your community.
onboardingLabelIdentityDesc: Stand out with custom labels and identity features. Available for Nova and Supernova members.
subscriptionAutoRenewDisclaimer: Auto-renewable subscription. Cancel anytime in App Store.
badgeInfoDescription: Badges can be obtained by completing achievements, supporting the Solar Network, becoming an important member in the community and taking part in special events. The active badge will display on your account name, others will always be visible on the profile page.

punishmentOverviewBlockLogin: You are restricted from logging in

meetStartDescription: Create a small real-world meet record, then let nearby people join and leave a shared trace that you met.
meetTapStartDescription: Create a meet, then show a code so the person in front of you can scan or open it instantly.
meetScanStartDescription: Create a meet, then show a code so the person in front of you can scan or open it instantly.
meetStartReadyDescription: Your phone will create the meet first, then advertise the meet ID so someone nearby can discover and join it.
meetJoinDescription: Find the person you are meeting nearby, join their session, and leave a shared record of being there together.
meetJoinNearbyHint: Nearby scan starts automatically when you open this tab.
meetJoinScanningHint: Looking for active nearby hosts now.
meetJoinReadyDescription: Use nearby scan to discover someone around you, or enter the meet ID directly.
meetTapDescription: Open a meet from a copied Solian meet link, or scan the code with your system camera and jump straight into the record.
meetTapHint: Use your camera for the QR code, or copy a Solian meet link to your clipboard and open it here.
meetTapStartHint: Once the meet starts, show the QR code on this page so the other person can scan it or open the link.
meetTapUnsupported: Scan meet is not available right now.
meetTapHostUnsupported: Scan meet is not available right now.
meetScanDescription: Scan the code to join the meet.
meetScanClipboardPrompt: Use your system camera or scan it here
meetScanJoinHint: If the link is already on your clipboard, open it here. Otherwise scan the QR code with your camera.
meetScanStartHint: After the meet is created, show the QR code on the live page so the other person can scan it with the system camera.
meetScanUnsupported: Scan meet is not available right now.
meetScanLiveSubtitle: Swap name cards and leave a shared trace of meeting in person.
meetScanCardsHostHint: Each person who joins leaves their card here, so this meet becomes a small record of who crossed paths.
meetScanCardsGuestHint: Once you join, your card appears here with everyone else who met in person.
meetScanCardsEmpty: The first scanned person will appear here as a card.
meetScanStageHostTitle: Show your code, exchange your cards
meetScanStageGuestTitle: Scan the host's code to swap cards
meetScanStageHostHint: Keep this screen open while the other person scans. Their name card will appear here once they join.
meetScanStageGuestHint: Point your camera at the host's code, then step into the shared meet record together.
meetScanHint: This code opens a `solian://meets/...` deep link, so the system camera can send people straight into this meet.
meetScanCameraHint: Point your camera at a Solian Meet QR code and we will open it right away.
meetScanJoinedHint: You met in person, and now this moment has a face to remember.
meetTapMatchedDescription: This is the person behind the Tap Meet you just opened.
meetLocationGpsOnlyHint: Use your current GPS position if you want this meet to carry a place.
meetNotesHint: A short message people should see before joining
meetBluetoothUnavailable: Nearby Bluetooth meet discovery is not available on this platform.
meetBroadcastLimited: Nearby scan is available here, but hosting Bluetooth broadcast may be limited by the current platform runtime.
meetJoinIdRequired: Please enter a meet ID first.
nearbyDescription: Stay anonymously discoverable around you. We rotate short-lived Bluetooth tokens, then resolve them into visible people without broadcasting profile data.
nearbyDiscoverableHint: Broadcast rolling nearby tokens so people around you can resolve your presence.
nearbyDiscoverableUnsupported: This device can still scan for nearby people, but background BLE advertising is not available here.
nearbyFriendOnlyHint: Only friends can resolve your nearby presence.
nearbyPeersHint: These are recently resolved nearby people who are visible to you right now.
nearbyPeersEmpty: Keep this page open for a moment while nearby devices rotate and resolve.
meetQrScanHint: Point your camera at a meet QR code to join
meetDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this meet? This action cannot be undone.
fediverseProfileHint: This user is from the Fediverse network. Information may be incomplete.
physicalPassportsEmptyDescription: Add your first physical passport to link physical identity to your account.
physicalPassportDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this physical passport? This action cannot be undone.
physicalPassportLockConfirm: Locking this passport will prevent any future modifications. This action cannot be undone.
addPhysicalPassportDescription: Scan a plain NFC tag to register it with your account. Encrypted NTAG424 tags are factory-produced and claimed by scanning.
nfcTapToWrite: Tap your passport to write data
physicalPassportLabelHint: Enter a name for this passport
physicalPassportSunKeyDescription: This key is used to verify passport authenticity and protect against tampering.
nfcNotAvailable: NFC is not available on this device
nfcNoTagDetected: No passport detected. Please try again.
nfcTagNotNdef: This passport does not contain NDEF data
nfcTagEmpty: No data found on this passport
scanPhysicalPassportDescription: Tap a physical passport to view the owner's profile.
physicalPassportActiveDescription: Enable or disable the passport's functionality
adminRegisterEncryptedTagDescription: Scan and register an NTAG424 SUN encrypted tag. This will generate a SUN key and configure the tag for secure authentication.
assignedUserIdDescription: If set, only this user can claim the tag. If empty, the first authenticated scanner will claim it.
claimEncryptedTagDescription: Enter the UID of a factory-produced encrypted tag to claim it. The UID is usually printed on the tag.
authFactorRecoveryCodeRequired: You need add a recovery code before adding any other auth factors.
authFactorExisted: You already added this type of factor.
tagNotClaimed: Tag was unclaimed, you can claim it.
encryptedTagRegsiterHint: 3rd party encrypted tag cannot be registered directly, if you obtained this tag from Solsynth. Please use scan feature and claim it.
settingsClearCacheConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear the cache? This will remove all cached images and temporary files.
settingsStorageNotAvailable: Storage information not available on this platform
deleteGoalConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this goal?
deleteWorkoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this workout?
deleteAllMetricsConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all {} metrics?
fediverseInteractionHint: To interact with Fediverse posts, you need an Fediverse identity. Please set one up in Creator Hub, you can make any of your publishers to an fediverse actor.
fediverseFollowHint: To follow Fediverse actors, please set up a default Fediverse publisher in Account Settings.
healthPermissionRequiredDescription: To access your fitness data, we need permission to read your health information.
selectDataTypesToSync: Please select at least one data type
noHealthDataDescription: Start tracking your fitness with Apple Health or Google Fit to see your data here.
authorizedAppsDescription: Manage third-party apps with access to your account
authorizedAppDeauthorizeHint: Are you sure you want to revoke access for this app? This app will no longer be able to access your account.
notificationPreferencesDescription: Manage how you receive notifications for each topic
notificationPreferenceSilentDesc: Store only, no push or real-time
notificationResetHint: Are you sure you want to reset this preference to default?
notificationCustomTopicError: Please enter both topic and description
settingsMediaProxyHelper: Media proxy will run a local HTTP server on your device, to support streaming cache, provides better media playback experience.
fitnessSyncHint: Tap to sync your latest workouts and metrics
ViewLeaderboardHint: See how you rank against others
selectImageHint: Tap below to select an image
compressionHint: Higher quality means larger file size
maxImagesError: You can only select up to {} images
cropRequiredHint: Please crop the image before uploading
directoryPathHelper: Enter a directory path. The directory will be created when you upload files to it.
